# whisper-macos-cli

> macOS-exclusive CLI for local audio transcription via whisper.cpp with Metal GPU acceleration

whisper-macos-cli is a Rust CLI that transcribes audio files to text using
whisper.cpp with Apple Silicon Metal GPU. It accepts audio via file
arguments or stdin pipe and emits JSON on stdout. Designed for AI agent
integration with a strict stdin/stdout JSON contract.

## Key Features

- Metal GPU acceleration on Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3/M4)
- Maximum quality defaults: large-v3 model, BeamSearch beam_size=8
- Supports: MP3, OGG/Vorbis, OGG/Opus (WhatsApp), FLAC, WAV, AAC
- Auto-detects language from macOS system locale
- VAD-based chunking prevents hallucinations via earshot (Silero)
- NDJSON mode for batch processing with summary line
- correlation_id UUID v7 in every output for traceability
- schema_version in every output for evolution safety
- HTTPS-only model downloads with User-Agent identification
- Local-only: zero telemetry, zero phone-home

## Quick Start

```bash
cargo install whisper-macos-cli
whisper-macos-cli models download
whisper-macos-cli transcribe audio.ogg
```

## Contract

### Input

- Audio files as positional arguments or piped via stdin
- Supported formats: MP3, OGG/Vorbis, OGG/Opus, FLAC, WAV, AAC
- Stdin requires non-TTY (pipe or redirect)

### Output

- stdout: JSON (single file) or NDJSON (multiple files with --ndjson)
- stderr: tracing logs (suppressed with --quiet)
- Exit codes follow sysexits.h convention

### JSON Envelope (every output)

```json
{
  "schema_version": "0.1.0",
  "correlation_id": "0190a3b4-7c8d-7abc-9def-1234567890ab",
  "...": "command-specific fields"
}
```

### Transcription Result

```json
{
  "schema_version": "0.1.0",
  "correlation_id": "0190a3b4-7c8d-7abc-9def-1234567890ab",
  "file": "voice.ogg",
  "language": "pt",
  "language_source": "os_locale",
  "model": "large-v3",
  "duration_seconds": 45.2,
  "text": "Full transcription text here",
  "vad_chunks": 3,
  "processing_time_ms": 8432
}
```

### Error Envelope

```json
{
  "schema_version": "0.1.0",
  "error": true,
  "code": 66,
  "message": "input not found: /tmp/missing.ogg",
  "category": "input",
  "retryable": false,
  "retry_after_ms": null,
  "hint": "check the file path and try again",
  "docs_url": "https://github.com/.../docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md",
  "correlation_id": "0190a3b4-7c8d-7abc-9def-1234567890ab"
}
```

## Subcommands

| Subcommand  | Purpose                                |
|-------------|----------------------------------------|
| transcribe  | Transcribe one or more audio files     |
| models      | Download, list, locate, or remove models|
| doctor      | Diagnose environment and dependencies  |
| schema      | Emit full JSON Schema envelope         |
| config      | Emit current effective configuration   |
| completions | Generate shell completions             |
| commands    | Emit command tree as JSON              |
| init        | Generate SKILL.md and AGENTS.md        |
| licenses    | Print third-party license attribution  |
| resume      | Resume a previous batch (v0.1: no-op)  |

## Global Flags

| Flag                  | Purpose                                |
|-----------------------|----------------------------------------|
| --quiet               | Suppress stderr output                 |
| -v / -vv / -vvv       | Increase verbosity                     |
| --print-schema        | Print JSON schema and exit             |
| --print-config        | Print effective config and exit        |
| --no-input            | Disable interactive fallbacks          |
| --color auto/always/never | Control colored output             |

## Transcribe Flags

| Flag                    | Default   | Purpose                       |
|-------------------------|-----------|-------------------------------|
| --language LANG         | os locale | Force language                |
| --model MODEL           | large-v3  | Whisper model to use          |
| --beam-size N           | 8         | Beam search width             |
| --timestamps            | false     | Include segments              |
| --ndjson                | false     | NDJSON output                 |
| --output-format FMT     | json      | json or ndjson                |
| --vad-threshold FLOAT   | 0.5       | VAD threshold                 |
| --concurrency N         | 2         | Parallel transcriptions      |
| --input-format FMT      | auto      | Force input format            |
| --dry-run               | false     | Resolve without transcribing  |
| --timeout SECS          | -         | Per-attempt request timeout   |
| --retry-count N         | -         | Retry attempts                |
| --retry-max-elapsed SECS| -         | Total retry budget            |
| --offline               | false     | Fail fast in air-gapped mode  |
| --resume WORKFLOW_ID    | -         | Resume previous batch         |

## Environment Variables

| Variable           | Purpose                                      |
|--------------------|----------------------------------------------|
| WHISPER_MODEL      | Override default model                       |
| WHISPER_LANGUAGE   | Override default language                    |
| NO_COLOR           | Disable colored output                       |
| CI                 | Disable interactive prompts (1/true/yes)     |
| RUST_LOG           | Override tracing log level filter            |
| SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH  | Unix timestamp for reproducible builds       |
| NO_INPUT           | Override --no-input flag                      |
| QUIET              | Override --quiet flag                        |

## Exit Codes

- 0: success
- 2: usage error
- 64: no input provided
- 65: invalid audio data
- 66: input file not found
- 69: service unavailable
- 70: inference error
- 74: I/O error
- 78: configuration error
- 130: SIGINT (Ctrl+C)
- 141: SIGPIPE
- 143: SIGTERM

## Documentation

- AGENTS.md: Integration guide for AI agents
- AGENTS.pt-BR.md: Brazilian Portuguese integration guide
- SKILL.md: agent skill descriptor
- README.md: Project overview
- README.pt-BR.md: Brazilian Portuguese overview
- docs/HOW_TO_USE.md: Advanced recipes
- docs/COOKBOOK.md: 20+ worked examples
- docs/INTEGRATIONS.md: 35+ integration patterns
- docs/CROSS_PLATFORM.md: Platform support matrix
- docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md: Common errors and solutions
- docs/FAQ.md: Frequently asked questions
- CONTRIBUTING.md: Contribution workflow
- SECURITY.md: Vulnerability reporting
- CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md: Community standards
- PRIVACY.md: Data handling
- CHANGELOG.md: Release history

## Models

| Model    | Size      | Default | Description                |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------------------------|
| tiny     | ~75 MB    |         | Fastest, lowest accuracy   |
| base     | ~142 MB   |         | Fast, basic accuracy       |
| small    | ~466 MB   |         | Balanced speed/accuracy    |
| medium   | ~1.5 GB   |         | High accuracy              |
| large-v3 | ~3 GB     | yes     | Maximum accuracy           |

## Token Budget

- Invocation overhead: ~200 tokens (JSON envelope parsing)
- Per-file transcription: ~50 tokens + transcribed text length
- Error handling: ~100 tokens

## Platform Requirements

- macOS 13 or later
- Apple Silicon (M1, M2, M3, M4)
- Metal GPU acceleration (automatic)
- cmake and Xcode CLI Tools for building from source
- 4 GB free disk space for the default model
